title: Whimscape Variated Villagers x Fresh Animations
description: Fresh Animations patch for "Whimscape Variated Villagers"
body:
### Fresh Animations patch for [Whimscape Variated Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-variated-villagers)

![villagericons2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cae88fd869216c42c976bac6213b1b8bbe630a6.png)

Make your villages look fresh and lively!

**• Requires** [**Entity Texture Features**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) **and** [**Entity Model Features**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

_**▶ Resource pack load order: ◀**_

![loadorder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e07889afc631236f908ce1bbdd55dccb6b5da426.png)

**★ Special Thanks to [Kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) for making Whimscape! ★**
